title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 05 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 05 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 05 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/03/2024
DCE iron ore futures tight by 0.69%. the main contract I2405 closed 879.5. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand.
